meta.title: Putin's Kleptocracy: Who Owns Russia?
meta.description: Hudson Institute’s Financial Corruption and Autocracy Initiative (FCAI) hosted a discussion with Professor Karen Dawisha on the origins of Russia’s kleptocracy. This session was moderated by FCAI Executive Director Charles Davidson. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
